title: NextChristmas
description: A christmas mod made for WinterJam 2020
body:
## Next Christmas

A mod made for [WinterJam 2020](https://minecraftmoddevelopment.github.io/MMD-Site/events/winter_jam_2020.html).

NextChristmas is a christmas mod that adds some christmas features. This includes

  * A biome with decorated christmas trees where snow does not melt in the light.
  * Reindeers that spawn in the Christmas Forest
  * A grain mill to grain down wheat, hazelnut or vanilla and make some biscuit dough.
  * An oven to bake the biscuits. The biscuits grant effectsfor a short time.
  * Sledges (Like boats but they are fast on snow and can be equipped with a chest to transport items and an elytra to flay through the sky.
  * A santa hat and four different christmas sweaters. In decembers mobs can spawn with santa hats.
